CREATE VIEW v_current_friendly_units AS
WITH anchor AS (
    SELECT MAX(datetime) AS ref_datetime
    FROM units
    WHERE side = 'b'
)
SELECT
    u.snapshotid,
    u.datetime AS ref_datetime,
    u.side,
    u.unitname,
    u.groupname,
    u.unittype,
    u.posx,
    u.posy,
    u.posz,
    u.damage,
    u.objectparent
FROM units u
JOIN anchor a ON u.datetime = a.ref_datetime
WHERE u.side = 'b'

CREATE VIEW v_initial_friendly_units AS
WITH anchor AS (
    SELECT MIN(datetime) AS ref_datetime
    FROM units
    WHERE side = 'b'
)
SELECT
    u.snapshotid,
    u.datetime AS ref_datetime,
    u.side,
    u.unitname,
    u.groupname,
    u.unittype,
    u.posx,
    u.posy,
    u.posz,
    u.damage,
    u.objectparent
FROM units u
JOIN anchor a ON u.datetime = a.ref_datetime
WHERE u.side = 'b'

CREATE VIEW v_current_enemy_units AS
WITH anchor AS (
    SELECT MAX(datetime) AS ref_datetime
    FROM units
    WHERE side = 'op'
)
SELECT
    u.snapshotid,
    u.datetime AS ref_datetime,
    u.side,
    u.unitname,
    u.groupname,
    u.unittype,
    u.posx,
    u.posy,
    u.posz,
    u.damage,
    u.objectparent
FROM units u
JOIN anchor a ON u.datetime = a.ref_datetime
WHERE u.side = 'op'

CREATE VIEW v_initial_enemy_units AS
WITH anchor AS (
    SELECT MIN(datetime) AS ref_datetime
    FROM units
    WHERE side = 'op'
)
SELECT
    u.snapshotid,
    u.datetime AS ref_datetime,
    u.side,
    u.unitname,
    u.groupname,
    u.unittype,
    u.posx,
    u.posy,
    u.posz,
    u.damage,
    u.objectparent
FROM units u
JOIN anchor a ON u.datetime = a.ref_datetime
WHERE u.side = 'op'

CREATE VIEW v_current_friendly_unit_count AS
SELECT
    ref_datetime,
    COUNT(*) AS unit_count
FROM v_current_friendly_units
GROUP BY ref_datetime

CREATE VIEW v_initial_friendly_unit_count AS
SELECT
    ref_datetime,
    COUNT(*) AS unit_count
FROM v_initial_friendly_units
GROUP BY ref_datetime

CREATE VIEW v_current_enemy_unit_count AS
SELECT
    ref_datetime,
    COUNT(*) AS unit_count
FROM v_current_enemy_units
GROUP BY ref_datetime

CREATE VIEW v_initial_enemy_unit_count AS
SELECT
    ref_datetime,
    COUNT(*) AS unit_count
FROM v_initial_enemy_units
GROUP BY ref_datetime
